description: Generate a NACA 4415 airfoil and a modified version featuring a 10-degree downward flap deflection at the 75% chord hinge position. Export the original airfoil coordinates to /home/ga/Documents/airfoils/naca4415_original.dat and the flap-deflected coordinates to /home/ga/Documents/airfoils/naca4415_flap10.dat in standard .dat format.
